creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 216233
patch2

I managed to reproduce the garbled UI and here's a patch that fixed it for me.  If you applied the previous patch you can revert it using "rm /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/files/patch-vcl_qt5_Qt5Instance.cxx".  Then apply this new patch as before:

cd /usr/ports
svn patch /path/to/patchfile

Then rebuild and reinstall libreoffice and run it using:

env SAL_VCL_QT5_USE_CAIRO=yes libreoffice
